parts.text: {"family":"Hofmann-Loffler-Freytag Reaction","candidate":{"candidate_id":"C1","substrate_smiles":["CCCCN(C)Cl"],"product_smiles":["CN1CCCC1"],"optional_reagent_smiles":["O=S(=O)(O)O"],"rationale":"Canonical HLF reaction.
